comment: Used when the Vercel project's Root Directory is set to 'client'. The client depends on the @texas-holdem/shared workspace package and the repo-root pnpm-lock.yaml, so the build must run from the repo root (one level up). Output lands in client/dist, which is './dist' relative to this client root.
buildCommand: cd .. && pnpm --filter @texas-holdem/shared build && pnpm --filter client build
